top_signals.title: Hayabusa2 flies past asteroid as Japan aims to acquire data for planetary defense
top_signals.summary: The encounter marks a new phase for Hayabusa2, which completed its primary mission in 2020 after returning samples from the asteroid Ryugu to Earth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
